description: Fill animation for solid shapes. Renders a liquid fill effect inside a referenced solid, clipped by fill level.
utility: Animate a fill effect inside a 3D solid

arguments.name: solidRef
arguments.description: Reference to solid shape to fill

examples.expression:
S = cube3d(at(4,4), view(14,14), 3, c(navy), fc(lightyellow), fo(0.5))
fill3d(S, range(0, 1), fc(blue), fo(0.6))

S = cylinder3d(at(4,4), view(14,14), 2, 5)
fill3d(S, range(0, 0.7), fc(aqua), fo(0.5))
